sql_array: CREATE TABLE encrypted_messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, message BYTEA, certificate BYTEA, key BYTEA);
INSERT INTO encrypted_messages (id, message, certificate, key) VALUES (1, file_to_string('message1.p7m'), file_to_string('cert1.pem'), file_to_string('key1.key.pem'));
UPDATE encrypted_messages SET message = smime_decrypt(message, certificate, key, 'secret') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT smime_decrypt(message, certificate, key, 'secret') FROM encrypted_messages WHERE id = 1;
